title: Flatline Ops Rear Slide Gun Back Butt Plate Cover for Glock Firearm Accessory
description:
The 6061-T6 aluminum Flatline Ops black anodized slide plate cover will personalize the look of your protection device and replace the plastic, factory part for added strength and design aesthetics. Installs and removes more easily than the factory cover plate for maintenance access. At Flatline Ops they have integrated over 50 years of master tool making and a firearm obsession into one of the most innovative, game-changing company's on the rise in the firearm industry. Our mission is to rethink and meet the needs of the modern shooter. We design and produce highly technical hunting, long-range shooting and precision firearm products to improve accuracy, eliminate "cant error" and satisfy your demand for precision and dependability.

Key Features

  • Made in USA
  • Added strength and design aesthetics
  • Available in Wave, Grid, 30 & 45 Degree Patterns

Product Specifications
